title: Balance of Power in the Airam Sector

'''Balance of Power in the Airam Sector''' was a campaign fought between the ruling [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], mostly in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam Sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

==Battles==
===Attack on Imperial Convoy near Mylok===
An Imperial convoy, consisting of three waves of two groups of [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]], of four ships each (FRT groups ''[[Lumin]]'' and ''[[Mazur]]'') and [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|Assassin-class corvette]] group ''[[Bira]]'' (five ships each), is under attack from Rebel starfighters in the [[Mylok system/Legends|Mylok system]]. Responding to their distress call the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Blue Ruin]]'' and its starfighters intervene and try to defend the convoy.<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

===Two on two===
The Rebel [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40]] cruisers ''[[Re]]'' and [[Ta (MC40a light cruiser)|''Ta'']] are brought to battle by the Imperial [[Strike-class medium cruiser|Strike-class cruisers]] ''[[Asp]]'' and [[Eel (Strike-class)|''Eel'']].<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

===Four to four===
Four STRKCs from group [[Longbow (squadron)|''Longbow'']], supported by starfighters, launch an attack against [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Chie (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Chie'']] and its fighter screen.<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

===Attack on secret Imperial base===
The Rebel Alliance has found an Imperial base in the [[Talcim Cluster/Legends|Talcim Cluster]] from where the Empire sends forth a group of 16 [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|Escort shuttles]] (E/S group ''NoShow''). These shuttles carry biological weapons to be unleashed against [[Airam (group)|Airam]] supporters of the Rebels. The Rebels try to intercept the shuttles and Avenger Squadron is called in to reinforce the weak defenses of the base.<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

===Attack on Rebel capital ships===
Imperial fighters carry out a heavy starfighter attack against a small rebel flotilla consisting of [[Odysseus|''CRS Odysseus'']], [[Zeus|''CRL Zeus'']] and [[Thor (Strike-class)|''STRKC Thor'']].<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

===Facing Alliance Frigates===
[[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] [[Conqueror (Imperial-class)|''Conqueror'']] faces a rebel strike fleet consisting of [[Lion (Nebulon-B2 frigate)|M/FRG Lion]], [[Lance (Nebulon-B2 frigate)|M/FRG Lance]] and [[Ornik|FRG Ornik]]. The Rebel mission briefing indicates that the mission is already considered a success if the ''Conqueror'' retreats; its destruction is not required. (The ''Conqueror'' must later be destroyed during a [[Ambush in the Goff system|canonical campaign mission]] for the Rebel campaign, ruling out the possibility of its (canonical) destruction in this battle mission although it is technically possible to destroy the ship during the mission.)<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

===Attack on Imperial shipyard===
Several Imperial capital ships ([[Fury (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''FRG Fury'']], [[Straasa|''ESC Straasa'']], [[Manticore (Strike-class)|''STRKC Manticore'']], [[Sicorro|''M/FRG Sicorro'']], [[AD88|''CRV AD88'']] and 3 ships of [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|Assassin-class corvette]] (M/CRV) group ''[[192]]'') have powered down for maintenance at [[Depot XLS]] in the [[Fondor system/Legends|Fondor system]]. Rebel starfighters stage a surprise attack against the helpless capital ships but [[Hammer (Imperial-class)|''ISD Hammer'']] is en route to bolster the Imperial defenses.<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

===Last attack===
Yet another evenly matched fight pits Rebel [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught]] ''[[Karei]]'' against the Imperial [[Strike-class medium cruiser|Strike-class cruiser]] ''[[Ull]]'', along with their respective fighter complement.<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Far from the might of the Galactic Empire lie the Outer Rim Territories. Into this lawless region, the battered forces of the Rebel Alliance have withdrawn seeking refuge. Hoping to establish a new base among the fiercely independent clans of the Airam sector, they must first elude the formidable Admiral Senn and his Task Force Vengeance.|In-game Battle description|<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />}}
Balance of Power in the Airam Sector is a "Battle" from the [[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns|''Balance of Power Campaigns'']] expansion pack of the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' computer game, i.e. a set of eight different missions grouped together without forming a coherent campaign; Battles do not follow a storyline and the missions have no clear chronological order.<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

This Battle ties in with the two campaigns presented therein: [[Spreading the Rebellion]] and [[Imperial Task Force Vengeance]]. It augments the storyline of these two campaigns by providing additional engagements that were fought between the Rebel Alliance and the Empire on the sidelines of these opposing campaigns. However, the Battle missions are not a direct part of the campaigns proper. Their outcome is irrelevant to the overall storyline, and they need not be played to finish either campaign. Like with the other Battles in the game, they present evenly balanced missions where players can fly for either side, unlike in the campaign missions, where the player flies for one particular side and must achieve the mission goal to proceed to the next mission in the campaign.<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

On the rebel side, [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] is deployed against the Empire in all missions. On the Imperial side, [[Avenger Squadron|Avenger squadron]] (in [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]]) and [[Talon Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Talon Squadron]] (in [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Gunboats]]) feature prominently in most of these scenarios. Since [[Task Force Vengeance]] was only equipped with these craft during the 7th mission of the Imperial campaign and Talon squadron had not even been created before then, this indicates that in the overall chronological order, the Battle scenarios occur after the 7th Imperial campaign mission.<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

===Canonicity===
Although the occurrence of the individual missions can be considered canonical, they can be played for either side and the outcome naturally depends on the player's actions. Therefore, the actual canonical outcome of each mission is unclear. Since the setup of the individual battles and their participants are canonical but not their destruction, it is safe to assume that no side achieved a lasting effect (such as the destruction of a starship) over the course of the Battle missions.<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
